positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    tokyo != united_states).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    tokyo != world_championships).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    summer_olympic_games != united_states).

cnf(u17,negated_conjecture,
    ~sporting_event(world_championships)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    summer_olympic_games != world_championships).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    summer_olympic_games != tokyo).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    united_states != world_championships).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    sporting_event(summer_olympic_games)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define location(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
